mapper.select: SELECT INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID , CASE WHEN TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'RECEIPT' THEN '입고' WHEN TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'STORE_CLOSING' THEN '마감' WHEN TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'ADJUSTMENT' THEN '조정' END AS TRANSACTION_TYPE , T.REASON , T.TRANSACTION_MEMO , T.CREATED_AT , T.CREATED_BY , U.USER_NAME AS CREATED_BY_NAME , S.STORE_NAME , STORE_ID FROM INVENTORY_TRANSACTIONS T JOIN USERS U ON ( T.CREATED_BY = U.USER_NO ) JOIN STORES S USING ( STORE_ID ) WHERE INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID = #{inventoryTransactionId}

SELECT INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ITEM_ID , BEFORE_QUANTITY , AFTER_QUANTITY - BEFORE_QUANTITY AS CHANGED_QUANTITY , AFTER_QUANTITY , MATERIAL_NAME , INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID , STORE_INVENTORY_ID , MATERIAL_ID FROM INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ITEMS JOIN STORE_INVENTORIES USING ( STORE_INVENTORY_ID ) JOIN MATERIALS USING ( MATERIAL_ID ) WHERE INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID = #{inventoryTransactionId}
